zh.Haydock, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾海多可
zh.Pott Shrigley, Prestbury, Cheshire, Engl: 英國爾波特 史利格利

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Downes於1446年出生在英國爾波特 史利格利時，她的父親Sir Robert Downes51歲，母親Lady Alice Haydock39歲。她於1463年與Nicholas Snede在英國斯塔福爾凱勒結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1480年在英國爾享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Downes于1446年出生在英国爾波特 史利格利时，她的父亲Sir Robert Downes51岁，母亲Lady Alice Haydock39岁。她于1463年与Nicholas Snede在英国斯塔福爾凱勒结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1480年在英国爾享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Downes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Down with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (counties Clare and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Irish Gaelic Ó Dubháin (see Doane ).

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

variants.name: Downs
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Downes  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Downes was born in 1446, in Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Downes, was 51 and her mother, Lady Alice Haydock, was 39. She married Nicholas Snede in 1463, in Keele, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1480, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Downes est née en 1446, à Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Downes, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Haydock, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Snede en 1463, à Keele, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1480, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Downes 1446 in Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Downes 51 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Haydock 39. Sie hat 1463 in Keele, Staffordshire, England Nicholas Snede geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1480 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Downes è nata il nel 1446 nel Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Downes, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Haydock, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Snede nel 1463, nel Keele, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1480, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Downesが1446年にイギリスチェシュアイアポット シュリグリーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Downesは51歳，母Lady Alice Haydockは39歳であった。1463年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアケエルでNicholas Snedeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1480年にイギリスチェシュアイアで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Downes(이)가 1446년 영국 체실르 포트 슈리글리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Downes(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Haydock(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1463년 영국 스태퍼드실르 케일에서 Nicholas Snede(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 체실르에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Downes nasceu em 1446, em Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Downes, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Haydock, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Snede em 1463, em Keele, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1480, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Downes родилась в 1446 г. в местности потт шригли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Downes было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Haydock, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Snede в 1463 г. в местности киль, стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1480 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Downes nació en 1446, en Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Downes, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Haydock, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Nicholas Snede en 1463, en Keele, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1480, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años.
